changes.summary: Liability cap structure changed from symmetric mutual caps to asymmetric caps with Customer's liability uncapped and Provider's cap reduced to 6 months.
changes.original_text: Each party's aggregate liability under this Agreement is capped at the fees paid by Customer in the prior twelve (12) months.
changes.redline_text: Customer's aggregate liability under this Agreement is uncapped. Provider's aggregate liability is capped at the fees paid by Customer in the prior six (6) months.
changes.rationale: Customer now has unlimited liability exposure while Provider's liability protection is strengthened with a lower cap amount.
